description: 对协作白板应用进行全面 UI 重绘和功能增强。修复菱形按键、消除画布抖动、新增箭头和图片插入功能，优化橡皮擦为真实擦除，合并为双行统一功能栏。

userStories.title: Fix canvas jitter during drawing and input
userStories.description: As a user, I want the canvas to stay stable while drawing or typing, so that the experience is smooth.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview drawing separated from formal redrawCanvas — no shapes state mutation during mouseMove
Shapes state only committed on mouseUp
Text input overlay does not trigger canvas redraw
Verify in browser: no jitter when drawing rectangles, ellipses, freehand
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix canvas jitter during panning
userStories.description: As a user, I want panning the canvas to be smooth without content jittering.
acceptanceCriteria: panX/panY changes only update canvas transform, do not trigger shape re-render
Verify in browser: no jitter when dragging/panning canvas
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Rhombus shape tool
userStories.description: As a user, I want to draw a rhombus/diamond shape so that I can add diamond shapes to the whiteboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Add RhombusShape type in types/shapes.ts (center x/y, width, height)
Add RhombusShape to Shape union type
Add rhombus button in toolbar (icon: ◇, shortcut: D)
drawShape implements rhombus via rc.polygon connecting 4 vertices (top, right, bottom, left)
Rhombus supports select, move, resize, property editing
Rhombus supports both solid and outline fill modes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Arrow shape tool
userStories.description: As a user, I want to draw arrows with arrowheads so that I can indicate direction in my diagrams.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ArrowShape type in types/shapes.ts (startX, startY, endX, endY, style)
Add ArrowShape to Shape union type
Add arrow button in toolbar (icon: →, shortcut: A)
drawShape renders arrow: roughjs linearPath + arrowhead triangle at end
Arrowhead size proportional to strokeWidth (strokeWidth * 3)
Arrow supports solid/dashed line styles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Image insert feature
userStories.description: As a user, I want to insert images onto the whiteboard so that I can include pictures in my diagrams.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ImageShape type in types/shapes.ts (x, y, width, height, src: string)
Add ImageShape to Shape union type
Add image button in toolbar (icon: image icon, shortcut: I)
Clicking image button opens file picker dialog
Selected image converted to Data URL and added as shape
Image default width: 200px, maintains aspect ratio
Image supports select, move, resize
drawShape renders image via ctx.drawImage
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Separate solid and outline shape buttons
userStories.description: As a user, I want separate buttons for solid and outline shapes so I don't need to draw then fill separately.
acceptanceCriteria: Rectangle outline (icon: ▭) and solid (icon: ▮) as separate buttons
Ellipse outline (icon: ○) and solid (icon: ●) as separate buttons
Rhombus outline (icon: ◇) and solid (icon: ◆) as separate buttons
Solid button sets fillStyle: 'solid' with current unified color
Outline button sets fillStyle: 'none'
Remove Fill Style selector (none/solid/hatch) from PropertiesPanel
Remove Fill Color selector from PropertiesPanel
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Unified color picker bar
userStories.description: As a user, I want a single color picker that controls both stroke and fill colors so I don't have to manage two separate color sets.
acceptanceCriteria: Single row of color buttons in the toolbar bottom row
10 color options: black #000000, red #e03131, blue #1c7ed6, green #2f9e44, purple #6741d9, orange #e8590c, brown #a0522d, gray #868e96, pink #e84393, cyan #00cec9
Selected color applies to both strokeColor and fillColor for new shapes
Selected color updates both strokeColor and fillColor for selected shapes
Custom color picker (+ button) preserved
Remove Stroke Color and Fill Color sections from PropertiesPanel
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Pixel-based eraser
userStories.description: As a user, I want the eraser to erase only the pixels within the eraser stroke path, so it behaves like a real eraser.
acceptanceCriteria: Eraser no longer deletes entire shapes on click
Uses globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out' to erase pixels on canvas
Eraser has adjustable radius (default 20px, adjustable via toolbar width control)
Eraser path smooth (continuous circular/linear erase)
Erase effect visible in real time
freehand strokes: erased pixels disappear visually (pixel-level)
Note: pixel erase does not modify shapes data in MVP scope
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Unified two-row toolbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want all tools and color options in one unified floating toolbar so I have a cleaner interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete existing Toolbar.tsx and PropertiesPanel.tsx components
Create new UnifiedToolbar component with two rows
Row 1 (tools): drag handle, lock button, select, rectangle (outline/solid), ellipse (outline/solid), rhombus (outline/solid), line, arrow, freehand, eraser, image, clear canvas
Row 2 (options): color buttons — divider — width selector — divider — line style (solid/dashed)
Toolbar style: rounded corners, semi-transparent yellow background, shadow, dividers
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Draggable and lockable toolbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to move the toolbar and lock the canvas so I can organize my workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove minimize/collapse toggle button from toolbar
First button on left is drag handle (icon: grip), click and drag to reposition toolbar
Drag handle visible on hover or during drag
Second button on left is lock toggle (icon: 🔓/🔒)
Locked state: no drawing, no erasing, no shape select/move on canvas (pan and zoom still work)
Lock state managed in App.tsx, passed to CanvasComponent
Locked canvas cursor shows 'not-allowed' or 'default'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
